title: Jungle Friends Bing Bing Giraffe Rattle Blankie
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Super soft boa blankie with bing bing giraffe plush with rattle
Hand wash, air dry, from birth upwards, includes rattle
Part of the jungle friends family
description: Product Description Super soft boa blankie with bing bing giraffe plush with rattle, hand wash, air dry, from birth upwards, includes rattle, part of the jungle friends family Directions 1. Gently hand wash the blanket and giraffe plush toy with warm, mild soap and water. 2. Rinse thoroughly to remove all soap residue. 3. Lay the blanket and giraffe flat to air dry, away from direct sunlight or heat sources. 4. Do not machine wash or dry the product. 5. The product is suitable for use from birth upwards. Always supervise infants and young children when using the product. Box Contains 1 x Bing Bing Giraffe Rattle Blankie See more
